positive: A whimsical, highly stylized illustration featuring a central grouping of bioluminescent forest creatures and stylized exotic flora. The composition must be circular and balanced, designed for a seamless garment print. Main subjects include gentle glowing spirit fox silhouettes, giant luminous mushrooms, and intricately detailed hanging vines. Use a strong, deep navy and midnight teal color palette contrasted sharply with vibrant electric cyan, emerald green, and warm gold accents for the bioluminescence. Style: Highly detailed vector illustration meets Japanese Ukiyo-e print aesthetic. Lighting should be dramatic and emanating solely from the glowing subjects, creating deep shadows and high contrast. Composition must be symmetrical and centered, with clean, crisp lines suitable for textile printing. Minimalism in background space, maximum detail in the subject matter.
negative: blurry, sketch, cartoon, watermark, logo, text, cropped, signature, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grain, low contrast, sepia, monochrome
